text: بَعَثَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) إِلَى بِشْرِ بْنِ عُطَارِدٍ التَّمِيمِيِّ فِي كَلَامٍ بَلَغَهُ فَمَرَّ بِهِ رَسُولُ أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي بَنِي أَسَدٍ وَ أَخَذَهُ فَقَامَ إِلَيْهِ نُعَيْمُ بْنُ دَجَاجَةَ الْأَسَدِيُّ فَأَفْلَتَهُ

فَبَعَثَ إِلَيْهِ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فَأَتَوْهُ بِهِ وَ أَمَرَ بِهِ أَنْ يُضْرَبَ فَقَالَ لَهُ نُعَيْمٌ أَمَا وَ اللَّهِ إِنَّ الْمُقَامَ مَعَكَ لَذُلٌّ وَ إِنَّ فِرَاقَكَ لَكُفْرٌ قَالَ فَلَمَّا سَمِعَ ذَلِكَ مِنْهُ قَالَ لَهُ يَا نُعَيْمُ قَدْ عَفَوْنَا عَنْكَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ يَقُولُ ادْفَعْ بِالَّتِي هِيَ أَحْسَنُ السَّيِّئَةَ أَمَّا قَوْلُكَ إِنَّ الْمُقَامَ مَعَكَ لَذُلٌّ فَسَيِّئَةٌ اكْتَسَبْتَهَا وَ أَمَّا قَوْلُكَ إِنَّ فِرَاقَكَ لَكُفْرٌ فَحَسَنَةٌ اكْتَسَبْتَهَا فَهَذِهِ بِهَذِهِ ثُمَّ أَمَرَ أَنْ يُخَلَّى عَنْهُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Mahboub, from one of his companions,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> sent someone to Bishr Bin Utaradi Al-Tameemy regarding a speech which reached him<sup>asws</sup>. So the messenger of Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> passed by him among the Clan of Asad and seized him. So Nuaym Bin Dajaja Al-Asady stood up to him and had him released.

So Amir Al-Momineenasws sent someone to him, so he came up with him, and heasws ordered for him to be whipped. So Nuaym said to himasws, ‘But, by Allahazwj, the staying with youasws is a disgrace, and in separation from youasws is infidelity’. So when heasws heard that from him, heasws said to him: ‘O Nuaym! Weasws have excused you, for Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic is Saying [23:96] Repel evil by what is best. As for your words that, ‘Staying with youasws is disgrace’, so it is an evil which you have attained; and as for your words, ‘In separation from youasws is infidelity’, so it is a good deed which you have attained. So this here (compensates) for this’. Then heasws ordered that he be released from it’.
